config.user_description: The .gemini/skills/plan-and-do/SKILL.md often does not use the AskUser tool but some home-made terminal input tool. I previously asked for that because of a bug with long skills. Stop doing that now — always call ask_user.

discovery.test_command: bash -lc 'set -e; cd /Users/karsten/workspaces/fh/repos/coding-with-ai-lab; c=$(grep -c ask_user .gemini/skills/plan-and-do/SKILL.md); [ "$c" -ge 18 ] || { echo "SKILL.md ask_user count=$c < 18"; exit 1; }; c=$(grep -c ask_user .gemini/skills/plan-and-do/plan-and-do-modes.md); [ "$c" -ge 4 ] || { echo "modes ask_user count=$c < 4"; exit 1; }; ! grep -iE "read -p|home.?made terminal" .gemini/skills/plan-and-do/*.md || { echo "forbidden pattern found"; exit 1; }; echo OK'
